abilities: You take a lot of damage, huh? (healing ally on low HP)
Your wounds run deep... (healing ally on low HP)
Be careful, Shimada. (healing Genji or Hanzo )
(Japanese) You have nothing to worry about. (healing Mizuki )
Ho ho hey. (while in Winter Wonderland event)
How's the hunt? (to Ashe or Widowmaker )
Hey, big guy. (to Mauga , Reinhardt , or Roadhog )
Let the Kitsune guide you! (self and team)
chatter: Can't change the world by following all the rules.
If we do this right, they won't even know what happened.
So... I might sometimes pop out of thin air right next to you. Do not shoot me.
Stay in sight, and I'll keep you safe.
They have this coming. So let's give it to them.
Watch our flanks. They might try something.
My mother trained half our team. I'll sign the rest of you up for lessons. (in a team with both Genji and Hanzo )
Look, Mom. I'm an Overwatch agent. (with only Overwatch members on the team)
Look, Mom. I'm a Talon agent. (with only Talon members on the team)
Let's show them the difference a new generation can make. (with only young heroes on team)
We'll show them a trick or two.
Change of plans. Let's win this time.
Don't be down. We still got this.
Focus, and we might get out alive.
Don't hold back. 'cause this is it.
Now or never. Let's do this.
I don't give up that easily.
I licked my wounds. Let's go.
I don't blame them. I was going wild. (eliminated with a Kill Streak)
*laughs* I guess someone had to stop me. (eliminated with a Kill Streak)
Oh, he'll pay for that one. (eliminated by Mizuki )
*sigh* (Japanese: He's always bullying me.) (eliminated by Mizuki )
Looks like I'm waiting on the others.
We're a few punks short of a gang right now...
Aw, I feel all warm inside.
That's what I like to see.
Nice to know you have my back.
This might hurt more than usual.
Thought they were dead. But... guess not.
call-outs: Almost there. Keep up the defense!
Don't lose now. We're almost there.
Hold up the defense for just a little longer.
Don't let up! We don't have much time.
Keep attacking until the last second!
We're running out of time. Keep attacking!
eliminations: I'll pretend I didn't see that.
I thought you were the sniper. (eliminating Ana or Widowmaker )
You really need a scope to do that? (eliminating Ana or Widowmaker )
Looking a little burned out. (eliminating Anran )
Hey! A falling star. (eliminating D.Va or Lúcio )
So long, bestie... (eliminating D.Va or Mizuki )
You know you're not that important, right? (eliminating Domina )
Your pocket ninja's all grown up! (eliminating Genji )
Come on, Shimada... (eliminating Genji or Hanzo )
I won't hold back just 'cause we're friends. (eliminating Mizuki )
I just wanted to hang out... (eliminating Pharah or Zarya )
Thought you were a professional? (eliminating Pharah or Soldier: 76 )
Diabolical plans... canceled. (eliminating Ramattra or Vendetta )
Did you build that ball yourself? (eliminating Wrecking Ball )
You said no to aikido, so... (eliminating Wuyang )
Shouldn't have put your head there. (headshot)
Did you think you were safe up there? (eliminating an airborne opponent)
Welcome back to earth. (eliminating an airborne opponent)
This time, you might wanna stay down. (eliminating a recently-revived opponent)
Apologize to Ana when you wake up. (eliminating a Nano-Boosted enemy)
It's like you wanted to die! (eliminating enemy using ultimate)
That's youthful reflexes for you. (eliminating older heroes after using Swift Step)
Pfft, big deal. (eliminating Genji using Dragonblade)
Okay, that was a little harsh. (eliminating Mizuki with a headshot)
Not in charge any more. (eliminating Reinhardt during Charge)
Sorry, I'm not done yet. (eliminating Sojourn using Overclock)
I felt your presence. (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
Just needed a dash of mischief.
I thought this would be harder...
That can't be all of them?
Watch where you're headed, Shimada! (to Genji or Hanzo )
You might've heard them coming if you turned your music down! (to Lúcio )
You forget what my mom taught you? (eliminating Genji or Hanzo )
Does that one go on your highlight reel? (friendly D.Va eliminates enemy)
Just like my mom taught you. (friendly Genji or Hanzo eliminates enemy)
Looks like you've still got it. (friendly Genji or Hanzo eliminates enemy)
That was bomb. (friendly Junkrat eliminates enemy)
(Japanese) Not bad, Mizuki! (friendly Mizuki eliminates enemy)
Working some stuff out, huh? (friendly Reaper eliminates enemy)
Don't know why they thought they could pick a fight with you... (friendly Reinhardt , Roadhog or Zarya eliminates enemy)
Heh. They fell for that move? (unknown trigger)
interactions: Ana : You remind me of myself when I was younger. Kiriko : That a compliment? Ana : You be the judge. Kiriko : Okay... thanks for the compliment.

Kiriko : I only ever hear horror stories about siblings. Ever wish you were an only child? Anran : Honestly? I wouldn't give up my brother for the world. (variant if Wuyang is present, replaces response above) Anran : Literally every day of my life. Wuyang : Wha-- hey!
Ashe: We hunt foxes where I come from. Kiriko: Hm. Where I'm from, the foxes fight back.
Baptiste : Ready to heal some wounds? Kiriko : Physical, or emotional? Baptiste : *chuckle* If you can handle both, go for it.
D.Va : Can't they get anything done without us? Kiriko : It's a full-time job being the capable ones.

Kiriko : *sigh* They discontinued my favorite moisturizer. Got any recommendations? D.Va : Eh. Sorry, I don't use creams. I just splash some water on my face and call it a day. Kiriko : What?! At least use sunscreen!

Kiriko : I have some bounties you might want. Five of them, actually. Freja : *chuckle* I'm good at what I do, kid, but even I'm not going to mess with the Hashimoto . Kiriko : All right... Then how are you with rescue missions? Freja : Ah. If you've got the money, let's talk.
Freja : Strange place, this one. Saw a bounty out for a gang of kids . Kiriko : You didn't take it, right? Freja : I'd stay on my good side... just in case.
Kiriko : Remember when you had a bowl cut? Genji : Yes. You didn't want to be the only one. Kiriko : I never had one! Genji : I believe I have pictures.

Kiriko : You should come home, Genji. We need your help. Genji : There are others in the world who need saving. Kiriko : When I was a kid, you said you'd always be there for me. Genji : You are old enough to know it's not that simple.

Kiriko : Ugh, I'd kill for some donuts right about now... Genji : How many have you had today? Kiriko: (one of four): I think, seven. Or, eight... Like... ten? Probably twelve? I... totally lost count. Genji : *sigh* (Japanese: Good grief.)

Kiriko : The Hashimoto have completely overrun Tokyo . It's not much better in Kanezaka , either. Genji : I see how much you need me. But I do not know if the commander will permit my absence. Kiriko : She should open her eyes. If you don't come back now, there won't be anything left.

Genji : I was sorry to hear about your grandmother's passing. It must have been difficult. Kiriko : Yeah... it was right after mom made me quit my miko duties. I couldn't look her in the eye for weeks. Genji : I am glad you've resolved your differences. Not every family can. Kiriko : Me too. Better late than never.

Kiriko: Genji, remember the time you tripped over your sword in training? One of eight: Brigitte: Really? Cassidy: That sounds like him. Junker Queen: Ha! Some ninja. Mei: No way! *laughs* Mercy: Ho ho! Wish I was there. Reinhardt: What? Haha, hahahahaha! Tracer: Ha! Is that true? Winston: Is that true? Genji: It only happened once. Kiriko: Once was enough.
Kiriko : "Swift as the wind", huh, Genji? Genji : Even swifter, thanks to you.

Hanzo: Have you heard from your father ? Kiriko: A little. It's been harder to contact him since you escaped the Hashimoto . Hanzo: I did not wish to make matters worse for him. I'm sorry. Kiriko: *reassuring sigh* Don't be. I'm sure he's just glad you're back.

Hanzo: (one of two): Weighted like a stone. Blade, sharpened - yearns to punish. Strikes the final blow. Swifter than the wind. A rushing crimson river. Stains the earth with red. Kiriko: *groans* You're reciting your haikus out loud again...

Hanzo: The Shimada weapons were masterworks, but those ofuda were your father 's magnum opus. Kiriko: He made them for grandma when he proposed. Bringing the fox spirit to life really won her over. Hanzo: A sentimental, yet powerful gift. I see why she was impressed.

Kiriko: Is it true that my dad had to keep the fox spirit a secret from the clan ? Hanzo: Indeed. He was forbidden from crafting more anima avatars after forging our dragons. Kiriko: Why? You used them to help people. Hanzo: The scenes that haunt my memories... prove otherwise.
Kiriko: Do you think Genji will ever come back? Hanzo: Have faith, Kiriko. The years have changed us all, but he will return just as I have.

Kiriko: The Hashimoto run hourly patrols. We can sneak into the castle when they change shifts. Hanzo: I am... impressed. Your preparations are quite diligent. Kiriko: Well, I had to kill time until someone came back... Hanzo: Right. Then I will make your patience worthwhile.
Hanzo I hope your mother is well. Kiriko : The Hashimoto run our neighborhood now. So... Hanzo : Oh, I am sorry to hear that. Kiriko : Sorry enough to help?
Kiriko: My mom wants to know if you've kept up with the sword. Hanzo: I swore... never to wield a blade again. Kiriko: Mm. I'll tell her you're thinking of picking it back up.
Hanzo: Send my greetings to... Asa-sensei . Kiriko: You can say hi yourself.

Hazard : Heard you got into another scrap with the Hashimoto . The Yōkai doin' alright? Kiriko : We'll survive. We always do. Hazard : Have to hope for more than that, though, aye? Kiriko : Why do you think we keep fighting?
Illari : Can I pet your dog? Kiriko : My what? Oh! Uh... it's not a dog. Illari : But it looks like one. Is it a wolf? Kiriko : ...You know what? Just for you, it's a wolf.
Illari : Quit surprising me. It throws me off when you show up so suddenly. Kiriko : Sorry, won't happen again... Kiriko : Boo! Illari : *sigh* Stop that!
Kiriko: You're so cute! I could just squish you to bits! Jetpack Cat: *angry hiss* Kiriko: Aww, don't worry. I’m just pulling your tail. Jetpack Cat: *angry meow*
Kiriko: So, how'd you pull all those heists? Junkrat: Bombs! Kiriko: Uh huh. And...? Junkrat: (one of two): Was-- w-was there supposed to be another step? Get this: more bombs!

Junkrat: Peter piper picked a pepp-- No. Peter Piper pecked a--UGH! Kiriko: Are you people always this loud? One of four: Mercy: Don't lump us in with him. Pharah: He's not with us. Tracer: He's not with us. Winston: He's, uh... not with us.

Kiriko : You look nervous. Want to meditate? Juno : I am interested, but it sounds difficult. Kiriko : I'll try to walk you through it. Take a deep breath, and try to calm your thoughts... Juno : Alright. *sigh* ... I am incompatible with this activity.

Kiriko : Think I can use your ring tech on my bike? I have a race coming up soon. Juno : Would that be considered cheating? Kiriko : No! Well... maybe. Juno : *gasp* How thrilling! We will make it happen!
Kiriko: Might be tricky keeping this bunch alive. Lifeweaver: Between the two of us, how could we fail? Kiriko: What if they run off without us? Lifeweaver: Don't worry. I have a plan for that!
Kiriko: Listened to your album the other day. Lúcio: Oh, uh, did you like it? Kiriko: Not sure there was enough bass. I could almost hear the other sounds. Lúcio: Ha! I'll crank it up next time.
Kiriko: You check out the new Antler Antler album? Lúcio: You've heard of them? Kiriko: Yeah. So... what'd you think? Lúcio: Oh! Nobody uses fifteen electric guitars like those guys!
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Kiriko : Really? Take a guess... Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Kiriko : So DJ... what's your favorite animal? Lúcio : Oh! Uh, well... I really like treefrogs! Heh, I didn't expect anyone to ask. Kiriko : Treefrogs? Yeah, I can see it! *chuckle*
Mauga : You gotta give me some pointers on being more stealthy. Kiriko : I can't picture you sneaking up on anyone. Mauga : Y'know, I might just surprise you.
Kiriko : Does anyone have a bandage? Mercy : I should have a few. Kiriko : Finally! I'm glad someone came prepared.

Mizuki: Bought another Lucky Lucky Good Luck Amulet. I have a good feeling about today. Kiriko: I hope you don't buy those often. Pretty sure they're a scam. Mizuki: Every week since I got to Kanezaka . Kiriko: See... this is why you're broke.
Mizuki: Kiriko. I really need your help. Kiriko: What's wrong? Mizuki: I lost this week's Lucky Lucky Good Luck Amulet... Kiriko: There, there. I'll pray for you later.

Mizuki: Not sure Hanzo likes me much. Kiriko: Oh, don't take it personal. He thinks everyone's suspicious. Mizuki: Aw, but I'm such a stand-up guy. You trust me, right? Kiriko: Uh... not when you say it like that...

Mizuki: Tell Ryōta to stop tagging on Hashimoto turf. If they catch him, he's screwed. Kiriko: Mizuki... You're actually a huge softie, aren't you? Mizuki: Quit messing around. Don't you know what they do to people that piss them off? Kiriko: Relax, I'll talk to him. It's just funny you try to hide how much you care.

Kiriko: Where were you last night? Chikasa said she couldn't get a hold of you. Mizuki: If I told you, I'd have to kill you. Kiriko: Ugh. Can't you answer normally for once? Mizuki: Nah. I like making you mad.

Kiriko: Your new hat looks lighter. Nobuto did a good job. Mizuki: Yeah, I like it. Wish it was a little more lowkey, though. Kiriko: Right? If the Hashimoto find out what he can make, they'll paint a target on his back for sure. Mizuki: They do love a fashion statement.
Kiriko: Ajaraka mokuren tekerettsuno pa! (アジャらか木蓮 テケレッツのパ！) Mizuki: Um... Gesundheit? Kiriko: I was trying to get rid of that grim Reaper for you, but... he's still here. Reaper: *annoyed grumble*
Kiriko: You have a band-aid? Moira: Who exactly do you think I am? Kiriko: Someone who carries band-aids? Guess not.
Kiriko: Eugh... You look cheery. Moira: As cheery as you are significant.
Kiriko : Hey, you're pretty cool. Orisa : Yes, and you are a perfect 37 degrees Celsius. Kiriko : You got me there.

Pharah: I see your sneakers. You, me, the basketball courts later. Kiriko: Sure, but I don't play without stakes. Pharah: Likewise. What are you willing to lose? Kiriko: Oh, Pharah-chan. I've never lost.
Pharah: I don't work with criminals. Kiriko: What's right isn't always what's legal. Pharah: Then you change the laws. Kiriko: Easy for you to say.
Reaper : You brought a fox to a gunfight? *grumbling* Kiriko : You must be fun at parties. Reaper : I don't go to parties. Kiriko : Yeah, that makes sense. You'd have to be invited first.
Reaper: *sinister laugh* Death catches up with you. Kiriko: It helps when death wears his running shoes.
Kiriko: You look familiar. Are you the loud one? Reinhardt: No, I am Reinhardt Wilhelm! The one with the hammer and shield! Kiriko: But not the loud one. Sure.

Kiriko: Hammer Man! Any German music you recommend? Reinhardt: Krankenwagen Grün . Haha, the best band of the 2030's! Kiriko: Never heard of them. Reinhardt: What? They defined Techno-polka! You young people have no culture at all.
Kiriko: I like your mask. Roadhog: * grunts * Kiriko: I said, I like your mask, dude. Roadhog: Okay.
Sojourn : The Hashimoto are a massive force... with a lot more firepower than a gang of kids . Kiriko : What, you think we shouldn't fight back? Sojourn : I think you need to start fighting smarter.
Soldier: 76: You better keep up. This isn't a daycare. Kiriko: Kids can surprise you. Soldier: 76: Then I better not be disappointed. Kiriko: Kids also disappoint you.
Sombra: You'll never guess what I heard when I tapped the Hashimoto's calls. Kiriko: I don't do guesses. What's your price? Sombra: *tongue click* I have a feeling we're going to get along.

Kiriko : With a boss like yours, no wonder your company's so exploitative. Symmetra : Not all employees share her values. Kiriko : Okay. What are yours? Symmetra : They are still a work in progress...
Kiriko : I like your nickname. How'd you get it? Venture : I gave it to myself! Kiriko : Isn't that a little... tacky? Venture : Oh, very!
Venture: You'll like this one: How does a non-binary ninja take out a target? Kiriko: I'll bite. How? Venture: They slash them! Kiriko: Oh, good one! Bet you a hundred yen Genji doesn't get it.
Widowmaker: What experience do you possibly bring to this mission? Kiriko: Last week, my friends and I sank a Hashimoto party boat. Widowmaker: So... nothing. *sighs*
Winston: Hey, Kiriko. Do you do a lot of office work? Kiriko: No, why? Winston: Because you always leave a paper trail! Kiriko: *sigh*
Wrecking Ball: Be advised: the hamster has an instinctive fear of foxes. Kiriko: Is it because he looks delicious? Wrecking Ball: He says, "Yes, and... damn right I do."
Wrecking Ball: The hamster has a message for your fox. Kiriko: That's... not how it works. Wrecking Ball: The mammal is disappointed.

Wuyang : Ever trained your chi? I'm looking for more practice buddies! Kiriko : If you teach me tai chi, I'll teach you aikido. Wuyang : Uh, oh, wait. You're not just looking for an excuse to... flip me, are you? Kiriko : *laughs* Busted!
Zarya: You do too much cardio, not enough weight training. Kiriko: I'll lift some weights if you go jogging with me. Zarya: We will see if you can keep up.
Zarya: So you throw tiny daggers? Kiriko: Is that a problem? Zarya: Depends. How often do you miss? Kiriko: Let's find out.
map-specific: We're not in Ise, but I'll accept their offerings.
I hope those who died defending this place have found peace.
I should check in on Mr. Yoshida while I'm here. And maybe get some sweets for Akari ...
The Hashimoto rule this town with fear. It's time we give them something to be afraid of.
Let me show you around. (match start)
Kanezaka is under my protection. (match start)
No one is taking my home from me. (on respawn)
You're up, Pharah-chan. (in a team with Pharah)
*giggles* Simple geometry. (in a team with Hanzo)
This is London, huh? I've seen fancier.
I like this place, it's contemplative.
These are the first cacti I've seen that weren't dying on someone's windowsill.
